perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action recording of a young woman speaking directly to the camera in a close-up shot. (2) She smiles frequently, uses expressive hand gestures to emphasize her words, and touches her hair occasionally. (3) In the latter half, she covers her mouth while laughing and appears surprised by the story she is telling.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, energetic, and humorous tone in Mandarin throughout the video. (2) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music plays continuously, maintaining a lighthearted mood. (3) Subtle ambient indoor noise is present but not distracting. (4) A canned laughter sound effect (SFX) triggers at the very end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom, transcribing the speaker's dialogue. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Variety-show style captions such as '笑死' (hilarious), '兩个選擇' (two choices), and '有點曖昧' (a bit of flirtation/ambiguity) appear in the center-bottom to highlight key points of the narrative.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a constant flow of the creator talking to the camera, using jump cuts to maintain a fast pace.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a purple spaghetti-strap top and a thin silver necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with an off-white wall and some blurred objects/laundry on the right side.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a humorous personal story about 'testing' her dog's identity in a previous life through a choice game, ultimately finding it funny that the dog was supposedly her 'ambiguous/flirty' interest in a past life.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy talking head style with heavy use of variety-show captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies on the charm and storytelling ability of the creator to engage a lifestyle/vlog audience.
